about.headline: Building practical digital solutions with aesthetics and performance.
about.description: I have approximately three years of professional experience in software development and a strong passion for turning real-world problems into practical and impactful digital solutions. I am actively seeking opportunities to further expand my expertise in tech, particularly in software development and artificial intelligence.

contact.title: Ready to innovate?
contact.description: Whether it's a fullstack application, AI integration, or a scalable frontend system — I'm just a message away.

footer.text: Vann. Designed with aesthetics in mind.
